mapper.select: SELECT KANJI_NO AS kanjiNo, KANJI_TEXT AS kanjiText, ON_READING AS onReading, KUN_READING AS kunReading, MEANING_TEXT AS meaningText, DESCRIPTION AS description FROM KANJI WHERE DELETE_FL = 'N' ORDER BY KANJI_NO

SELECT K.KANJI_NO AS kanjiNo, K.KANJI_TEXT AS kanjiText, K.ON_READING AS onReading, K.KUN_READING AS kunReading, K.MEANING_TEXT AS meaningText, K.DESCRIPTION AS description, E.EXAMPLE_TEXT AS exampleText, E.EXAMPLE_READING AS exampleReading, E.EXAMPLE_MEANING AS exampleMeaning FROM KANJI K LEFT JOIN KANJI_EXAMPLE E ON K.KANJI_NO = E.KANJI_NO AND E.EXAMPLE_NO = ( SELECT MIN(EXAMPLE_NO) FROM KANJI_EXAMPLE WHERE KANJI_NO = K.KANJI_NO ) WHERE K.KANJI_NO = #{kanjiNo} AND K.DELETE_FL = 'N'
